Petition Concerning The Internal Affairs Of A Trust, Including 1)Determining Construction Of A Trust Instrument, And 2)Determining Existence Or Nonexistence Of Power To Act As Trustee, And 3)Appointing Or Removing A Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Continued To Jan-13-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by CourtCall for and with Wang Xing Yi (who requires the assistance of a Cantonese Interpreter). Christina C. Perez-Abelson appeared by CourtCall for Hok Kei Tom.

Mr. Bresler's client appeared and needed the assistance of a Cantonese Interpreter. The clerk informed the Court that a Cantonese Interpreter was not available today per an inquiry to the interpreter's office.

Matter called. The Court stated that a Cantonese Interpreter was not available today. Mr. Bresler stated that his office has an interpreter but that the individual was not currently in the office. Mr. Bresler also stated that the Court gave the parties additional time to take the deposition of Ms. Yi and that Ms. Yi's deposition was taken. Ms. Perez-Abelson concurred with Mr. Bresler's statement. Both counsel confirm for the Court that discovery is complete. The Court then set the matter for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge, Dept. 206 on January 13, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. (order for the same signed in open court). The Court stated that it was making this order on the understanding that discovery is complete. The Court addressed Ms. Yi and instructed her to speak with her counsel.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

*After the hearing, Ms. Yi was given a copy of the order by the clerk.

Petition Concerning The Internal Affairs Of A Trust, Including 1)Determining Construction Of A Trust Instrument, And 2)Determining Existence Or Nonexistence Of Power To Act As Trustee, And 3)Appointing Or Removing A Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Continued To Aug-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cristina Abelson appeared by telephone for Hok Kei Tam (Trustee).

Ms. Abelson stated that she received Mr. Bresler's communication and that his Assistant requested that the matter be continued for two weeks. Ms. Abelson also stated that there was some confusion about the July 8th deposition date, that she re-noticed the deposition for July 22, 2019, that Mr. Bresler was not able to provide assurance of his Client appearing on the 8th and that she has had no communication with Mr. Bresler since that notice. The Petition Concerning the Internal Affairs of a Trust, etc. is continued to August 21, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that they are right back where they started and that it expects to have the deposition issue resolved by then.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition Concerning The Internal Affairs Of A Trust, Including 1)Determining Construction Of A Trust Instrument, And 2)Determining Existence Or Nonexistence Of Power To Act As Trustee, And 3)Appointing Or Removing A Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Brelser appeared by telephone for Wang Xing Yi (Petitioner).
Cristina Abelson for Hok Kei Tam (Trustee/Respondent).

Ms. Abelson stated that she sent interrogatories and requests for production of documents to Counsel, that all of the responses are the same ("Petitioner is in China."), that they have tried to depose the Petitioner and they got the same response. Ms. Ableson also stated that the Petitioner was here in May, but she was told that Petitioner was not available to come to the East Bay. Mr. Bresler stated that the Petitioner was here, but she had to move, and that he agrees to produce his Client in six weeks from now. Ms. Abelson stated that she would like to set the matter for trial, that she would like to do discovery and that she will be out of the Country from June 24th through July 5th. The Petition Concerning the Internal Affairs of a Trust, etc. is continued to July 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a trial setting conference. Mr. Bresler is ordered to produce his Client for deposition no later than July 8, 2019.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition Concerning The Internal Affairs Of A Trust, Including 1)Determining Construction Of A Trust Instrument, And 2)Determining Existence Or Nonexistence Of Power To Act As Trustee, And 3)Appointing Or Removing A Trustee

Petition Concerning The Internal Affairs Of A Trust, Including 1)Determining Construction Of A Trust Instrument, And 2)Determining Existence Or Nonexistence Of Power To Act As Trustee, And 3)Appointing Or Removing A Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Apr-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Concerning The Internal Affairs Of A Trust, Including 1)Determining Construction Of A Trust Instrument, And 2)Determining Existence Or Nonexistence Of Power To Act As Trustee, And 3)Appointing Or Removing A Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Continued To Dec-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by telephone for and with Xing Yi Wang (present).
Howard Abelson and Christina Abelson for Hok Kei Tam (Respondent).

The Court inquired as to the certification status of the interpreter. The interpreter stated for the record: Her name is Carmen Li. Her Certification Number is 100365. She has an oath on file with the Court. The language to be interpreted is Cantonese to English and English to Cantonese.

Mr. Abelson stated that they are willing to waive notice regarding the errata and that they are in favor of mediation. Mr. Bresler stated that he is not prepared to go to mediation, that his Client has no money and that it's better to immediately set the matter for trial. The Court informed the Parties that it will not set the matter for trial until all discovery is done. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 3, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 5, 2018. The Petition Concerning the Internal Affairs of a Trust, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on December 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
